DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update a code block in a structured documentation example.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read code text from standard input.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Code text.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable code block id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Code language label.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Previous code block id for ordered code in the same section.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Example section id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional code block title.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update a text section in a structured documentation example.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Body format. Default: PlainText.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read example section text from standard input.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Example section text.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Example id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable section id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Previous section id for ordered sections in the same example.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional section title.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update a structured example for an existing documentation subject.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Body format. Default: PlainText.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read the first example section text from standard input.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: First example section text.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: CLI application name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: CLI command name or path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable example id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Model name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: CLI option token.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Previous example id for ordered examples on the same subject.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable id for the first example section.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Documentation subject id or key.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional short example summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Example title.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an authored documentation page in a MetaDocs workspace.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Authored narrative body.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable documentation subject id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional subject kind. Default: Guide.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: New MetaDocs workspace to create.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional parent subject id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional display path. Default: title.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional narrative slot. Default: Summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional authored documentation source id.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional authored documentation source display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Short subject summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Page title and subject display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Set this page as the default documentation view root.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Browse documentation by path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to browse. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: List the documentation contents as a navigable tree.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Maximum tree depth. Default: 4.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional documentation view id, name, or title.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to list. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Show help.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Refresh CLI reference documentation from a MetaCli workspace while preserving authored descriptions.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional MetaCli application id when the source workspace contains more than one application.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: New MetaDocs source workspace to create.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional parent subject id for the imported CLI application.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source MetaCli workspace to refresh reference documentation from.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Import selected workspace instance documentation from a modeled opt-in policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Refresh model reference documentation from a Meta workspace while preserving authored descriptions.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional source display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: New MetaDocs source workspace to create.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional parent subject id for the imported model subject.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source Meta workspace to refresh model reference documentation from.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in entity policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source workspace entity name to include.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in property policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source workspace entity name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Property name to import as a generated fact.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an opt-in relationship policy for workspace instance documentation.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source workspace entity name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Rebuild a suite workspace from source MetaDocs workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Source MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Suite workspace to rebuild. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Render a MetaDocs workspace as a static documentation site.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to render. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Search documentation subjects, descriptions, and details.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional subject kind filter.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Maximum number of matches. Default: 25.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to search. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Add or update an authored description for an existing documentation subject.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Body format. Default: PlainText.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Read authored description body from standard input.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Authored description body.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: CLI application name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: CLI command name or path.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Model name.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: CLI option token.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Description slot to add or update. Default: Summary.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Documentation subject id or key.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Optional description title. Defaults to the slot.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Validate a MetaDocs workspace lifecycle and reference integrity.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Include description authoring diagnostics.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Treat warnings as failing diagnostics.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: MetaDocs workspace to validate. Defaults to the current directory.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary

DocumentationNarrative.Body: Author, browse, merge, validate, and render modeled documentation workspaces for the meta and meta-bi suite.
DocumentationNarrative.Title: Summary
